title: Plan your group trip in 3 simple steps
description: Simple, collaborative and built for groups.

card1.title: Step 1: Invite your group
card1.description: Fill in the essentials. Add your friends or family in one click. Everyone sees the same trip.

card2.title: Step 2: Explore and discover
card2.description: Swipe through activities, restaurants and hotels. Add your favorites to the itinerary.

card3.title: Step 3: Decide and finalize
card3.description: Create polls, manage the budget and prepare the departure together.
